name: Carbon peeling fume extractor unit
shortDescription: Professional fume extractor for Q-switched ND:YAG laser carbon peeling treatments. HEPA and activated carbon filter, compact, quiet operation.
description:
Professional fume extractor for Q-switched ND:YAG laser carbon peeling treatments.

Efficiently removes smoke, fine dust, and contaminants generated during treatments, ensuring a hygienic working environment and high-level respiratory protection.

The device operates with a multi-stage filter system that includes both HEPA and activated carbon filters. Its compact design and quiet operation make it easy to integrate into any cosmetic treatment room.
metaTitle: Carbon peeling fume extractor | With HEPA filter
metaDescription: Professional fume extractor for carbon peeling treatments. HEPA and activated carbon filter system, compact design, quiet operation. Laser treatment safety.

final.headline: Interested in the carbon peeling fume extractor?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation, or order directly!

faq.question: Why is a fume extractor necessary for carbon peeling treatments?
faq.answer: During carbon peeling and other laser treatments, smoke, airborne particles, and even toxic substances are generated. The fume extractor efficiently removes these, protecting the respiratory system of both the operator and client and ensuring a hygienic work environment.

faq.question: What filter system does it use?
faq.answer: The device features a combined HEPA and activated carbon filter system. The HEPA filter effectively removes microparticles, while the activated carbon filter eliminates unpleasant odors.

faq.question: Which lasers can it be used with?
faq.answer: The fume extractor is universally compatible with all laser devices, including ND:YAG lasers, diode lasers, and pico lasers. Especially recommended for carbon peeling treatments.
